name: Hershey's Fudge Cake
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Vegetable Shortening or Vegetable Oil
2/3 cup Cocoa (Less if using Dutch Process)
1/4 cup Hot Water plus 2 to 3 Tablespoons
recipeInstructions:
This has been one of the most popular cakes Hershey has ever introduced. Grease two 9 X 1 1/2-inch layer cake pans and preheat oven to 350 degrees F.
Combine flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt in a bowl; set aside. Cream shortening and sugar with an electric mixer until light and fluffy. Beat in eggs and vanilla extract until well blended. Blend cocoa into hot water to form a smooth paste. Gradually add the cocoa mixture to the creamed ingredients, stirring to blend thoroughly. Alternately add flour mixture and milk, beating after each addition. Pour batter evenly into prepared pans. Bake 20 to 30 minutes or until tops spring back when lightly pressed. Let cool on racks for 10 minutes before removing from pans; allow to cool completely before frosting with Chocolate-Buttercream Frosting.
